name: agent-orchestrator
description: Agent orchestration skills for delegation, swarms, and model routing.
skillInstructions: Agent Orchestrator tool mapping for Kimi Code: use Kimi's native skill system to load orchestrator-init, orchestrator-delegate, or orchestrator-swarm when routed by the orchestrator bootstrap. When a skill asks to dispatch routes, use Kimi Agent tools only for Kimi-native routes; for external harnesses, produce the configured command or prompt unless the runtime exposes an execution tool.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate and swarm tasks across AI harnesses and models
interface.longDescription: Detect configured AI harnesses and local models, then route tasks through delegate and swarm workflows with cost, privacy, and capability policies.
